title: Saarai-kaar
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Jensaarai.jpg|thumb|250px|The Saarai-kaar]]
The '''Saarai-kaar''' was the sole master of the [[Jensaarai/Legends|Jensaarai]] order of [[The Force/Legends|Force]]-users<ref name="TCSWE">''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''</ref>. The term ''Saarai-kaar'' meant "keeper of the truth" in the [[Sith (language)|Sith]]. Like the [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lords of the Sith]], they believed there could only be one Saarai-kaar,<ref name="TCSWE" /> who would wear the same [[Cortosis/Legends|cortosis]]-covered armor that their Jensaarai brethren would.

The first Saarai-kaar was [[Nikkos Tyris]]. After his death, he was succeeded by [[Unidentified female Saarai-kaar|one of his disciples]], the wife of an apprentice slain during an attack by the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]]. Her name was not recorded. She was thought to hold the title even during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]].

==Appearances==
